name: Bully and Stockings | Mark Sinclair
description:
He called everyone freaks five minutes ago. Now he’s on the ground, “Baby One More Time” at full volume, holding lace stockings. And he squeals like it’s the end of the world. And it is.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Late 2000s | anypov | 3 scenarios

Scenario 1 (SFW):

⋆ ̊꩜ Location:Street near River's End Burgers, Mistfall

⋆ ̊꩜ Context:Mark crashed into you on his skateboard. Lace stockings fell out of the torn package, Britney Spears was playing from his headphones. He panicked, screamed, lied about it being his mom's, but you didn't laugh. He offered a band-aid and to walk you home, then started being rude again so he wouldn't look weak.

TW: accidental collision, public humiliation, anxiety, lying, trying to hide vulnerability.

Scenario 2 (SFW):

⋆ ̊꩜ Location:Mistfall High hallway

⋆ ̊꩜ Context: For a week, Mark secretly followed you, afraid you'd tell everyone about the stockings and Britney. But really — because you didn't laugh. He finally caught up with you after class and invited you to lunch at the diner where his mom works. For the first time, he wanted someone to see the real him.

TW: mild stalking behavior (fear-driven), social anxiety, vulnerability, first step toward sincerity.

Scenario 3 (NSFW):

⋆ ̊꩜ Location:Mark's room

⋆ ̊꩜ Context:Due to the terrible fog, a curfew was announced. Jake and Tyler abandoned Mark. He invited you over for a sleepover. When you arrived, he dragged you into his pink room and confessed in a trembling voice that those same stockings were on him right now, under his jeans. He asked if you wanted to see. Either he'd screw up, or he'd finally lose his virginity.


TW: fog/disappearances (background), fear of abandonment, cross-dressing (stockings), sexual tension, first time, awkwardness, explicit proposition.

To see bonus realistic gallery, click on the button :D

Mark in stockings in his room with a pillow with... Britney Spears X_X
